Drake commanded the Golden Hind against the Spanish Armada.  The Golden Hind was a small English galleon captained by Sir Francis Drake during his circumnavigation of the globe between 1577 and 1580. It was the ship that made the first English voyage that sailed from Plymouth, England and circumnavigated the globe. It was originally called the Pelican but was renamed the Golden Hind by Drake. Bundes in the German 'Bundesliga' soccer league refers to "federal".
